results.title: Tailwhip Debut Single I Think I've Said Enough: Usung Suburban Music
results.description: Band alternatif asal Bintaro, Tailwhip, merilis single debut I Think I've Said Enough. Mengusung genre Suburban Music dengan pengaruh rock dan punk.

results.title: Al-Hazzaa reviews broadcasting and production technologies at Qatar TV and QBC
results.description:
Doha, Qatar: The Qatar Media Corporation (QMC), represented by Qatar Television and Qatar Business Channel (QBC), welcomed Director General of the Gulf Radio and Television Organisation H E Dr. Abdulrahman bin Abdulaziz Al-Hazzaa, as part of an official visit aimed at exploring the latest technologies and advanced systems employed in broadcasting and media production.

Dr. Al-Hazzaa was received at the Qatar Television headquarters byDirector of Qatar TelevisionAli Saleh Al Sada, who presented an overview of the operational workflow within the television studios, including production and broadcasting processes. The delegation also toured the facilities and viewed the state-of-the-art equipment and technologies used to enhance visual content and improve production quality.

The visit also included a tour of QBC, where Dr. Al-Hazzaa was introduced to the channel’s specialised studios and advanced technical infrastructure supporting the production of economic and news content.

In addition, Dr. Al-Hazzaa visited the non-Arabic language radio stations operating under the Qatar Media Corporation. He was welcomed byDirector of Qatar RadioJaber Mohammed Al Surour, who guided him through the facilities and briefed him on the workflow and media services provided across the corporation’s various radio platforms.

At the conclusion of the visit, Dr. Al-Hazzaa commended the Qatar Media Corporation’s advanced technical capabilities and modern studio facilities.

results.title: A Well-Deserved Break for Dad: Weekend Movie Nights on GMA Pinoy TV
results.description: This Father’s Month, give Dad the kind of break he truly deserves. No long drives or crowded cinemas needed. Beginning this weekend, families can simply stay in, relax, and enjoy a movie together as GMA Pinoy TV lines up special weekend films made for every “Super Dad.”
